sn43.2:1.1: “Monks, I will teach you the unfabricated and the path leading to the unfabricated.
sn43.2:1.2: Listen & pay close attention. I will speak.” “As you say, lord,” the monks responded to the Blessed One.
sn43.2:1.3: The Blessed One said, “Which, monks, is the unfabricated?
sn43.2:1.4: Whatever is the ending of passion, the ending of aversion, the ending of delusion:
sn43.2:1.6: “And which is the path leading to the unfabricated?
sn43.2:1.8: This is called the path leading to the unfabricated...
